svg.title: DocForge Hub — document generation flowchart
svg.desc: Step-by-step flow from user selecting department and document type through AI generation, quality validation, export and Notion publishing.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user start document generation?')
sendPrompt('What is Step 1 — Select Department and Document Type?')
sendPrompt('How does the questionnaire system work?')
sendPrompt('How does FastAPI fetch the template from PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How does Azure OpenAI generate the document?')
sendPrompt('How does the quality validation engine score documents?')
sendPrompt('How is the document saved to PostgreSQL?')
sendPrompt('How does the library view work?')
